title: 'Talk to Mrs. Bland about internship' — Oct 2019 YES-Kennedy-Lugar urgency dump
html:
TL;DR

  • Late-October 2019 todo-dump (Yahir age ~16, junior year). Title is "Talk to Mrs. Bland about internship" but the body is dominated by an all-caps urgency push to complete the YES Kennedy Lugar study-abroad scholarship application: "URGENTLY** scan and do YES SHIT — take pic of self, scan transcripts to ap class or to y.gonzalez, scan the signed agreement, essay to host family, solidify the essay part."*
  • The State Department contact info appears in the note: phone "1 202.833.7522" and fax "1 202.833.7523" — the YES Abroad / AYUSA program's DC office (publicly listed numbers, not private). Confirms which year and which sponsor.
  • The internship lead — "Scott Carnes coding zeal" — is the Scott Carnes / Coding Zeal (Medford-area dev shop) thread that recurs through the November 2019 mega-todo (2019 11 13 coding zeal). Mrs. Bland is the broker, Carnes is the principal, internship is the goal. Doesn't appear to have converted.
  • The "Essay to host family" line is the major data point: Yahir made it past the YES Abroad initial screen — they only ask for a host-family-letter from advancing finalists. He didn't ultimately get the scholarship (no later YES references), but he was on the inside track in fall 2019.
  • The note also contains the supporting frame: "-do fba shit" (FBLA) and "-finish Chinese cards and recordings" — three scholarship-and-program tracks running in parallel during the same urgency window.

Key quotes

"URGENTLY*** scan and do YES SHIT / take pic of self / Scan transcripts to ap class or to y.gonzalez / Scan the signed agreement / Essay to host family / Solidify the essay part"

"Scott Carnes coding zeal"

"Call 1 202.833.7522 / Fax 1 202.833.7523"

Why it matters in the graph

  • Documents the YES Kennedy-Lugar finalist push — which until this note's ingestion was only stub-level on the yes kennedy lugar page. The host-family-essay requirement evidences he made it through screening; no follow-up means the program rejected him or he withdrew. This is the thwarted/delayed precursor to the Shanghai route via CIEE he'd take 5 years later — the China-aim was being actively pursued from at least 2019.
  • Establishes Mrs. Bland as the internship-broker in Grants Pass high school's faculty network and Scott Carnes as the would-be principal. Both stubs already exist; this note is the canonical source-pin for both.
  • Pair against 2019 11 13 coding zeal (16 days later) — same internship lead resurfaces in the November mega-todo, suggesting the Carnes thread stayed alive at least into mid-November before going dormant. Worth checking 2020 notes for any internship-summer outcome.

Open questions

  • Why did the YES Kennedy-Lugar bid fail? (Or did Yahir withdraw to focus on Ford / OSU applications?)
  • Did the Coding Zeal internship ever happen? Worth checking 2020 summer notes.
  • Is there a saved copy of the host-family essay anywhere in his Google Docs corpus?

Privacy redaction

  • Phone/fax numbers preserved (publicly listed YES Abroad / AYUSA DC office numbers, not personal contact info).
  • Email address (y.gonzalez) is partial and matches Yahir's known school-account convention — kept as written, low risk.

Wikilinks

yes kennedy lugar · mrs bland · scott carnes · ciee · shanghai study abroad · fbla · grants pass or · grants pass teen era · ford family foundation
